style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=3;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="760" x="2920" y="7000" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" -w</span></font><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Modify Content&nbsp;</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="170" x="3215" y="7050" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=8;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=none;" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=8;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=none;" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">read -r</span></font><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">View Content</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="170" x="2950" y="7050" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 16px;"><b>Permission Types</b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="170" x="2950" y="7010" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=3;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="760" x="2920" y="6830" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=8;fillColor=#b0e3e6;strokeColor=none;" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">- rwx r-x r--&nbsp;</span></font><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">10 characters</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="170" x="3220" y="6880" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 16px;"><b>Permission String</b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="170" x="2950" y="6840" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
